message:
fix(io): copy_buf tracks read_done state to flush correctly after EOF

The async copy_buf implementation had a race between EOF detection
and the final flush: when the reader returned Ok(0) (EOF), the
code immediately attempted to flush inline within the same poll
iteration.  If the flush returned Pending, it would un-mark
completed and re-enter the read path on the next poll, potentially
missing that EOF had already been reached.

Fix: New read_done flag is set when the reader signals EOF.
Subsequent polls skip the read path entirely and go straight to
the flush-and-complete path, which correctly handles Pending
flushes without re-reading.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
